_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of cyber mission force equipment taxonomy (Platform-Access-Payloads/Toolset), capability development process and repository.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of metadata types (business, technical, operational, process) and the systems and methods used to collect, store, and maintain each type.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-K-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-K-011 (DG, cosine: 0.550), DQ-K-011 (DQ, cosine: 0.543).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.3/10 (raw 0.327). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, process]. DCWF-only terms [access, capability, cyber, development, equipment, force] vs WIDAI-only terms [business, collect, maintain, metadata, methods, operational] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.866 (P=0.862, R=0.870). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.1%). "Knowledge of cyber mission force equipment taxonomy (Platform-Access-Payloads/To" and "Knowledge of metadata types (business, technical, operational, process) and the" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.569 > STS 0.327 (gap +0.242). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge, process] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.9%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, process]. DCWF-only: [access, capability, cyber, development, equipment, force]. WIDAI-only: [business, collect, maintain, metadata, methods, operational].
